name: nssm_helper: multi-encoding Buffer detection (4 unit tests for _decodeNssmBuffer)
description: Bug B4 regression guard. Verifies that _decodeNssmBuffer() (in scripts/install/_nssm_helper.js) correctly handles: (1) UTF-8 input, (2) UTF-16 LE input (real NSSM 2.24 piped stderr on Windows), (3) invalid/no-version input returns error shape, (4) combined empty-stdout + UTF-16 LE-stderr mirrors real execution. Authority: stage_12_7_amended_mid.md §18 (Bug B4).
